concerns.text: T054's required documents list omits 'invariant_algorithms.md' which FR-003 explicitly mandates, even though T054a creates it separately. Creates ambiguity about document requirement status.

T046's description for 'Generate derivation notes' does not specify the required content sections (formula citations with page/section references, step-by-step transformation logic, intermediate values, parameter values, justification for non-standard choices) as mandated by FR-007.

Constitution infrastructure tasks T065 and T066 lack explicit Constitution Principle citations (Principle II for citation validation, Principle V for content hashing) in their task descriptions, creating an audit traceability gap.
T054's documentation list references 'logs.md' but T049 creates 'operation_logs.md', creating ambiguity about which filename to reference in the required documents checklist.

T026 validates tabulation accuracy for core invariants but FR-003/SC-008 explicitly state algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. Task description conflates tabulation validation with algorithm validation terminology.
